label: Agent Pool
description: Run a fixed list of agents in parallel through openagentic-proxy. Aggregates their results with the configured strategy (merge/first/vote).

settings.name: agents
settings.label: Agents
settings.description: Array of { agentId?, role, task, model?, tools?, maxTurns?, costBudget?, timeout? } specs.

ai.shortDescription: Run several agents in parallel via openagentic-proxy.
ai.whenToUse: When you want N agents working on the same input concurrently and aggregated.
ai.examplePrompt: run a research agent and a fact-checker agent in parallel on the trigger payload
ai.promptHints: Reference the merged result with {{steps.<id>.content}} and the per-agent results with {{steps.<id>.agents}}.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_count
outputAssertions.errorMessage: No agents executed in the pool run.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_majority_succeeded
outputAssertions.expression: result && Array.isArray(result.agents) && result.agents.filter(a => a && (a.status === 'completed' || a.status === 'success')).length >= Math.ceil(result.agents.length / 2)
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Less than half of the pool agents completed successfully.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || !result.content || (result.content.length > 0 && !result.content.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i))
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Pool produced no substantive output (likely all agents returned 'no info' / refusal responses).
